hypotheses.claim: 過去リターン上位銘柄は将来も相対的に高いリターンを示す。
hypotheses.economic_mechanism: 投資家の反応遅れ・情報拡散の遅さが短中期の継続を生むという仮説。
hypotheses.title: Jegadeesh–Titman型モメンタム

hypotheses.claim: Banz (1981), The relationship between return and market value of common stocks の公開後因子リターンが再現される。
hypotheses.economic_mechanism: Delayed post-publication stress test. SMB is a diversified size-factor proxy, not Banz's original NYSE security-level regression.
hypotheses.title: Banz (1981), The relationship between return and market value of common stocks

hypotheses.claim: Fama and French (1992), The Cross-Section of Expected Stock Returns の公開後因子リターンが再現される。
hypotheses.economic_mechanism: SMB is a return-factor proxy for the paper's security-level size characteristic result.
hypotheses.title: Fama and French (1992), The Cross-Section of Expected Stock Returns

hypotheses.claim: Fama and French (1992), The Cross-Section of Expected Stock Returns の公開後因子リターンが再現される。
hypotheses.economic_mechanism: HML is a return-factor proxy for the paper's security-level book-to-market characteristic result.
hypotheses.title: Fama and French (1992), The Cross-Section of Expected Stock Returns

hypotheses.claim: Fama and French (1993), Common risk factors in the returns on stocks and bonds の公開後因子リターンが再現される。
hypotheses.economic_mechanism: Post-publication return of the published HML factor construction.
hypotheses.title: Fama and French (1993), Common risk factors in the returns on stocks and bonds

hypotheses.claim: Fama and French (1993), Common risk factors in the returns on stocks and bonds の公開後因子リターンが再現される。
hypotheses.economic_mechanism: Post-publication return of the published SMB factor construction.
hypotheses.title: Fama and French (1993), Common risk factors in the returns on stocks and bonds

hypotheses.claim: Fama and French (2015), A five-factor asset pricing model の公開後因子リターンが再現される。
hypotheses.economic_mechanism: Post-publication return of the CMA investment factor.
hypotheses.title: Fama and French (2015), A five-factor asset pricing model

hypotheses.claim: Fama and French (2015), A five-factor asset pricing model の公開後因子リターンが再現される。
hypotheses.economic_mechanism: Post-publication return of the RMW profitability factor.
hypotheses.title: Fama and French (2015), A five-factor asset pricing model

implementation_variants.definition: Fama/French Mom: high prior-return portfolios minus low prior-return portfolios.
limitations: 原論文の証券レベル完全再現ではない。
implementation_variants.name: Fama/French Mom factor proxy

implementation_variants.definition: Delayed post-publication stress test. SMB is a diversified size-factor proxy, not Banz's original NYSE security-level regression.
limitations: 因子リターン検証であり、原論文の証券レベル回帰を再現しない。
implementation_variants.name: smb_percent

implementation_variants.definition: SMB is a return-factor proxy for the paper's security-level size characteristic result.
limitations: 因子リターン検証であり、原論文の証券レベル回帰を再現しない。
implementation_variants.name: smb_percent

implementation_variants.definition: HML is a return-factor proxy for the paper's security-level book-to-market characteristic result.
limitations: 因子リターン検証であり、原論文の証券レベル回帰を再現しない。
implementation_variants.name: hml_percent

implementation_variants.definition: Post-publication return of the published HML factor construction.
limitations: 因子リターン検証であり、原論文の証券レベル回帰を再現しない。
implementation_variants.name: hml_percent

implementation_variants.definition: Post-publication return of the published SMB factor construction.
limitations: 因子リターン検証であり、原論文の証券レベル回帰を再現しない。
implementation_variants.name: smb_percent

implementation_variants.definition: Post-publication return of the CMA investment factor.
limitations: 因子リターン検証であり、原論文の証券レベル回帰を再現しない。
implementation_variants.name: cma_percent

implementation_variants.definition: Post-publication return of the RMW profitability factor.
limitations: 因子リターン検証であり、原論文の証券レベル回帰を再現しない。
implementation_variants.name: rmw_percent

protocol_snapshots.decision_rule: NW t >= 1.96, bootstrap lower bound > 0, positive late mean, positive 25 bps mean.
protocol_snapshots.name: Locked post-publication OOS midpoint protocol
protocol_snapshots.oos_rule: Chronological post-publication window with midpoint early/late split.

strategy_genomes.allocation: Long-short factor return; no live allocation
